overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night, featuring futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and industrial elements. The footage appears to be from a high-quality video game engine, showcasing dense urban environments with vibrant neon signage and atmospheric lighting.

vertical signage with 'ELAMAIN' text mounted on the left building facade
metal pedestrian bridge spanning across the street overhead
tall building covered with multiple neon advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow cyberpunk alley with green metal kiosk structures lining the left side. Overhead metal walkways span the street, and distant neon signs illuminate the path ahead. The environment is enclosed with industrial architecture and no visible pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional urban corridor approaching large holographic display

events.description: a pedestrian NPC becomes visible standing on the right side near a concrete barrier

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward a large holographic billboard, approaching a stationary pedestrian on the right

notable_agents.action: standing still near a concrete barrier on the right side, facing toward the camera

large cylindrical metal pipes running along the right side building facade
white and red striped concrete barrier blocks on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving toward a prominent large holographic billboard displaying a face, with industrial piping systems visible on the right. The green kiosks from the previous section recede behind as the street opens slightly, and a stationary NPC pedestrian becomes visible near a concrete barrier on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alley with large pipes and neon storefronts

events.description: passing the stationary pedestrian on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past the pedestrian and continuing through an industrial section with large overhead pipes and a burning barrel

shop entrance with bright green and purple neon lighting on the right

segments.scene_description: Passing the stationary pedestrian and moving through an industrial alleyway featuring large overhead pipes, a burning barrel with open flame, and neon-lit storefronts on the right. The large holographic billboard is now behind and to the left as the path continues deeper into the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a claustrophobic industrial alley that gradually opens into a vibrant, neon-lit urban corridor. It begins by navigating a narrow passage lined with green metal kiosks and spanned by overhead walkways, with distant neon signs guiding the way. As the camera advances, the enclosed space expands slightly, shifting focus toward a towering holographic billboard of a face while industrial piping emerges on the right and a lone pedestrian appears by a concrete barrier. The scene then pushes past the pedestrian and deeper into the cityscape, moving beneath massive overhead pipes and past a burning barrel. Finally, the path leads toward a series of glowing storefronts as the holographic display recedes into the background.
